visual_matches.rating: Float - Rating of the item in the image
visual_matches.reviews: Integer - Number of reviews of the item in the image

price.value: String - Price of the item in the image
price.extracted_value: Float - Extracted price of the item in the image
price.currency: String - Price currency of the item in the image

visual_matches.in_stock: Boolean - Availability of the item in the image
visual_matches.condition: String - Condition of the item in the image
visual_matches.thumbnail: String - URL to the image thumbnail
visual_matches.thumbnail_width: Integer - width of the image thumbnail
visual_matches.thumbnail_height: Integer - height of the image thumbnail
visual_matches.image: String - URL to the full image
visual_matches.image_width: Integer - width of the full image
visual_matches.image_height: Integer - height of the full image
visual_matches.exact_matches: Boolean - Indicates if there are exact matches
